seoTitle: Keyneton vs Kiana — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Keyneton and Kiana. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Keyneton and Kiana.
heading: Keyneton vs Kiana — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Keyneton, South Australia and Kiana, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kiana has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Keyneton (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Keyneton or Kiana safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Keyneton has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Kiana scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Keyneton scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Kiana scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Keyneton or Kiana?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kiana has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
